creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm sorry that you have ahd to wait for a response.  I have restored the 
old port to test, but it no longer builds with PHP 5.4.  If you can 
point to a source for a newer version that will work, please let us know 
and we can put it back in the ports tree.  In the meantime, perhaps 
databases/php5-pdo_sqlite may substitute.
